title: Identify plant specimens
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify plant specimens demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Inspect plant morphological characteristics

pcs.text: Observe morphological, tactile and sensory characteristics of the plant specimens
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe morphological, tactile and sensory characteristics of the plant specimens?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe morphological, tactile and sensory characteristics of the plant specimens.

pcs.text: Record observations and characteristics according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record observations and characteristics according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record observations and characteristics according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify the plant division by comparing plant specimen's characteristics with taxonomic classification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the plant division by comparing plant specimen's characteristics with taxonomic classification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the plant division by comparing plant specimen's characteristics with taxonomic classification.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Inspect plant morphological characteristics

elements.title: Determine status of health and effect on characteristics

pcs.text: Inspect the plant specimen for health conditions that affect plant characteristics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect the plant specimen for health conditions that affect plant characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect the plant specimen for health conditions that affect plant characteristics.

pcs.text: Recognise and record health characteristics indicative of plant that support identification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and record health characteristics indicative of plant that support identification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and record health characteristics indicative of plant that support identification.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine status of health and effect on characteristics

elements.title: Identify the specimen

pcs.text: Use reference material to compare plant specimen's characteristics to taxonomic levels (categories)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use reference material to compare plant specimen's characteristics to taxonomic levels (categories)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use reference material to compare plant specimen's characteristics to taxonomic levels (categories).

pcs.text: Obtain and compare known images or samples to plant specimens
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and compare known images or samples to plant specimens?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and compare known images or samples to plant specimens.

pcs.text: Analyse plant specimens for specific characteristics and identify to lowest level (category) of classification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse plant specimens for specific characteristics and identify to lowest level (category) of classification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse plant specimens for specific characteristics and identify to lowest level (category) of classification.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Identify the specimen

elements.title: Report on the process results

pcs.text: Compile observations and analysis of plant specimen's morphology according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compile observations and analysis of plant specimen's morphology according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile observations and analysis of plant specimen's morphology according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record plant specimen's identity, observations, analysis and identifying characteristics according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record plant specimen's identity, observations, analysis and identifying characteristics according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record plant specimen's identity, observations, analysis and identifying characteristics according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Report identification to client according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report identification to client according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report identification to client according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Report on the process results
